_publications._publicationTitle: A randomized placebo-controlled lovastatin trial for neurobehavioral function in neurofibromatosis I.

_contextSnippet: There was also a differential effect in favor of statin treatment for verbal category fluency (P = 0.02; f² = 0.19)
details: Verbal category fluency showed significant differential treatment effect favoring lovastatin (P = 0.02, f² = 0.19), with scores improving from 9.83±3.06 to 10.43±2.15 in lovastatin group vs declining from 11.33±2.81 to 8.50±2.51 in placebo group
